mapper.select:
SELECT PRIMARYORGANIZATIONCH parent, SECONDARYORGANIZATIONCH child, SJXJBM resourceId, NAME tableName FROM CLASSIFY_INTERFACE_ALL_DATE where PRIMARYORGANIZATIONCH is not null and SECONDARYORGANIZATIONCH is not null
and (PRIMARYORGANIZATIONCH like '%'||#{nodeName}||'%' or SECONDARYORGANIZATIONCH like '%'||#{nodeName}||'%'or NAME like '%'||#{nodeName}||'%')
GROUP BY PRIMARYORGANIZATIONCH, SECONDARYORGANIZATIONCH, SJXJBM, NAME

SELECT PRIMARYDATASOURCECH parent, SECONDARYDATASOURCECH child, SJXJBM resourceId, NAME tableName FROM CLASSIFY_INTERFACE_ALL_DATE WHERE PRIMARYDATASOURCECH IS NOT NULL and SECONDARYDATASOURCECH IS NOT NULL
and (PRIMARYDATASOURCECH like '%'||#{nodeName}||'%' or SECONDARYDATASOURCECH like '%'||#{nodeName}||'%'or NAME like '%'||#{nodeName}||'%')
GROUP BY PRIMARYDATASOURCECH, SECONDARYDATASOURCECH, SJXJBM, NAME

SELECT FACTORONENAME parent, FACTORTWONAME child, SJXJBM resourceId, NAME tableName FROM CLASSIFY_INTERFACE_ALL_DATE WHERE FACTORONENAME IS NOT NULL and FACTORTWONAME IS NOT NULL
and (FACTORONENAME like '%'||#{nodeName}||'%' or FACTORTWONAME like '%'||#{nodeName}||'%'or NAME like '%'||#{nodeName}||'%')
GROUP BY FACTORONENAME, FACTORTWONAME, SJXJBM, NAME

SELECT T.resourceId, T.accessProvide, T.beginTime, T.dataDirection, T.accessAccept, T.thirdpartyProvide, T.tache, T1.NAME dataName FROM ( SELECT P.RESOURCE_ID resourceId, SUM( P.DATA_COUNT ) accessProvide, MIN( P.START_NO ) beginTime, P.DATA_DIRECTION dataDirection, SUM( A.DATA_COUNT ) accessAccept, 0 thirdpartyProvide, 1 tache FROM ( SELECT RESOURCE_ID, DATA_COUNT, DATA_DIRECTION, START_NO, DATA_ID FROM DAC_ACCESS_INSIDE_BILL WHERE BILL_TYPE = 1 AND RESOURCE_ID = #{resourceId} AND START_NO >= #{startTime} AND START_NO <= #{endTime} ) P LEFT JOIN ( SELECT DATA_COUNT, DATA_ID FROM DAC_ACCESS_INSIDE_BILL WHERE BILL_TYPE = 2 AND RESOURCE_ID = #{resourceId} AND START_NO >= #{startTime} AND START_NO <= #{endTime} ) A ON P.DATA_ID = A.DATA_ID GROUP BY P.RESOURCE_ID, P.DATA_DIRECTION ) T LEFT JOIN ( SELECT DISTINCT SJXJBM, NAME FROM TABLE_ORGANIZATION_ASSETS ) T1 ON T.resourceId = t1.SJXJBM

SELECT T.resourceId, T.accessProvide, T.beginTime, T.dataDirection, T.accessAccept, T.thirdpartyProvide, T.tache, T1.NAME dataName FROM ( SELECT P.RESOURCE_ID resourceId, SUM( P.DATA_COUNT ) accessProvide, MIN( P.START_NO ) beginTime, P.DATA_DIRECTION dataDirection, SUM( A.DATA_COUNT ) accessAccept, SUM( T.DATA_COUNT ) thirdpartyProvide, 2 tache FROM ( SELECT RESOURCE_ID, DATA_COUNT, DATA_ID, START_NO, DATA_DIRECTION FROM DAC_ACCESS_STORAGE_INSIDE_BILL WHERE BILL_TYPE = 1 AND RESOURCE_ID = #{resourceId} AND START_NO >= #{startTime} AND START_NO <= #{endTime} ) P LEFT JOIN ( SELECT DATA_COUNT, DATA_ID FROM DAC_ACCESS_STORAGE_INSIDE_BILL WHERE BILL_TYPE = 2 AND RESOURCE_ID = #{resourceId} AND START_NO >= #{startTime} AND START_NO <= #{endTime} ) A ON P.DATA_ID = A.DATA_ID LEFT JOIN ( SELECT DATA_ID, DATA_COUNT FROM DAC_ACCESS_PROVIDER_BILL WHERE RESOURCE_ID = #{resourceId} ) T ON P.DATA_ID = T.DATA_ID WHERE T.DATA_ID IS NOT NULL GROUP BY P.RESOURCE_ID, P.DATA_DIRECTION ) T LEFT JOIN ( SELECT DISTINCT SJXJBM, NAME FROM TABLE_ORGANIZATION_ASSETS ) T1 ON T.resourceId = t1.SJXJBM

SELECT BILL_TYPE billType, PROVIDER_BILL_NO billNo, PROVIDER_NO partyNo, RESOURCE_ID resourceId, DATA_COUNT dataCount, DATA_FINGERPRINT dataFingerprint, FINGERPRINT_TYPE fingerprintType, DATA_SIZE dataSize, START_NO startNo, END_NO endNo, SOURCE_LOCATION sourceLocation, BILL_STATE billState, LAST_FAIL_BILL lastFailBill, CHECK_METHOD checkMethod, DATA_SEND_TIME dataTime, DATA_CHECK_TIME dataCheckTime, DATA_SOURCE_NAME dataSourceName, RESULT_DES resultDes, DATA_SOURCE_TYPE dataSourceType, DATA_ADMINISTRATOR dataAdministrator, ADMINISTRATOR_TEL administratorTel, DATA_ID dataId, JOB_NAME jobName FROM DAC_ACCESS_STORAGE_INSIDE_BILL WHERE BILL_TYPE = 1 AND IS_LOCAL = '0' AND PROVIDER_BILL_NO = #{billNo} AND DATA_SEND_TIME >= to_date(#{startTime},'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') AND DATA_SEND_TIME <= to_date(#{endTime},'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') union all SELECT A.BILL_TYPE billType, A.ACCEPTOR_BILL_NO billNo, A.ACCEPTRO_NO partyNo, A.RESOURCE_ID resourceId, A.DATA_COUNT dataCount, A.DATA_FINGERPRINT dataFingerprint, A.FINGERPRINT_TYPE fingerprintType, A.DATA_SIZE dataSize, A.START_NO startNo, A.END_NO endNo, A.SOURCE_LOCATION sourceLocation, A.BILL_STATE billState, A.LAST_FAIL_BILL lastFailBill, A.CHECK_METHOD checkMethod, A.DATA_ARRIVE_TIME dataTime, A.DATA_CHECK_TIME dataCheckTime, A.DATA_SOURCE_NAME dataSourceName, A.RESULT_DES resultDes, A.DATA_SOURCE_TYPE dataSourceType, A.DATA_ADMINISTRATOR dataAdministrator, A.ADMINISTRATOR_TEL administratorTel, A.DATA_ID dataId, A.JOB_NAME jobName FROM DAC_ACCESS_STORAGE_INSIDE_BILL A WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM DAC_ACCESS_STORAGE_INSIDE_BILL WHERE DATA_ID=A.DATA_ID AND BILL_TYPE = 1 AND IS_LOCAL = '0' AND PROVIDER_BILL_NO = #{billNo} AND DATA_SEND_TIME >= to_date(#{startTime},'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') AND DATA_SEND_TIME <= to_date(#{endTime},'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss')) AND A.BILL_TYPE = 2 AND A.IS_LOCAL = '0'

SELECT BILL_TYPE billType, ACCEPTOR_BILL_NO billNo, ACCEPTRO_NO partyNo, RESOURCE_ID resourceId, DATA_COUNT dataCount, DATA_FINGERPRINT dataFingerprint, FINGERPRINT_TYPE fingerprintType, DATA_SIZE dataSize, START_NO startNo, END_NO endNo, SOURCE_LOCATION sourceLocation, BILL_STATE billState, LAST_FAIL_BILL lastFailBill, CHECK_METHOD checkMethod, DATA_ARRIVE_TIME dataTime, DATA_CHECK_TIME dataCheckTime, DATA_SOURCE_NAME dataSourceName, RESULT_DES resultDes, DATA_SOURCE_TYPE dataSourceType, DATA_ADMINISTRATOR dataAdministrator, ADMINISTRATOR_TEL administratorTel, DATA_ID dataId, JOB_NAME jobName FROM DAC_ACCESS_STORAGE_INSIDE_BILL WHERE BILL_TYPE = 2 AND ACCEPTOR_BILL_NO = #{billNo} union all SELECT P.BILL_TYPE billType, P.PROVIDER_BILL_NO billNo, P.PROVIDER_NO partyNo, P.RESOURCE_ID resourceId, P.DATA_COUNT dataCount, P.DATA_FINGERPRINT dataFingerprint, P.FINGERPRINT_TYPE fingerprintType, P.DATA_SIZE dataSize, P.START_NO startNo, P.END_NO endNo, P.SOURCE_LOCATION sourceLocation, P.BILL_STATE billState, P.LAST_FAIL_BILL lastFailBill, P.CHECK_METHOD checkMethod, P.DATA_SEND_TIME dataTime, P.DATA_CHECK_TIME dataCheckTime, P.DATA_SOURCE_NAME dataSourceName, P.RESULT_DES resultDes, P.DATA_SOURCE_TYPE dataSourceType, P.DATA_ADMINISTRATOR dataAdministrator, P.ADMINISTRATOR_TEL administratorTel, P.DATA_ID dataId, P.JOB_NAME jobName FROM DAC_ACCESS_STORAGE_INSIDE_BILL P WHERE BILL_TYPE = 1 and P.DATA_ID = (select DATA_ID from DAC_ACCESS_STORAGE_INSIDE_BILL where BILL_TYPE = 2 AND ACCEPTOR_BILL_NO = #{billNo})

SELECT BILL_TYPE billType, PROVIDER_BILL_NO billNo, PROVIDER_NO partyNo, RESOURCE_ID resourceId, DATA_COUNT dataCount, DATA_FINGERPRINT dataFingerprint, FINGERPRINT_TYPE fingerprintType, DATA_SIZE dataSize, START_NO startNo, END_NO endNo, SOURCE_LOCATION sourceLocation, BILL_STATE billState, LAST_FAIL_BILL lastFailBill, CHECK_METHOD checkMethod, DATA_SEND_TIME dataTime, DATA_CHECK_TIME dataCheckTime, DATA_SOURCE_NAME dataSourceName, RESULT_DES resultDes, DATA_SOURCE_TYPE dataSourceType, DATA_ADMINISTRATOR dataAdministrator, ADMINISTRATOR_TEL administratorTel, DATA_ID dataId, JOB_NAME jobName, SYN_INCEPT_DATA_ID synInceptDataId FROM DAC_ACCESS_PROVIDER_BILL WHERE BILL_TYPE = 1 AND PROVIDER_BILL_NO = #{billNo} AND DATA_SEND_TIME >= to_date(#{startTime},'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') AND DATA_SEND_TIME <= to_date(#{endTime},'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') union all SELECT A.BILL_TYPE billType, A.ACCEPTOR_BILL_NO billNo, A.ACCEPTOR_NO partyNo, A.RESOURCE_ID resourceId, A.DATA_COUNT dataCount, A.DATA_FINGERPRINT dataFingerprint, A.FINGERPRINT_TYPE fingerprintType, A.DATA_SIZE dataSize, A.START_NO startNo, A.END_NO endNo, A.SOURCE_LOCATION sourceLocation, A.BILL_STATE billState, A.LAST_FAIL_BILL lastFailBill, A.CHECK_METHOD checkMethod, A.DATA_ARRIVE_TIME dataTime, A.DATA_CHECK_TIME dataCheckTime, A.DATA_SOURCE_NAME dataSourceName, A.RESULT_DES resultDes, A.DATA_SOURCE_TYPE dataSourceType, A.DATA_ADMINISTRATOR dataAdministrator, A.ADMINISTRATOR_TEL administratorTel, A.DATA_ID dataId, '' jobName, A.SYN_INCEPT_DATA_ID synInceptDataId FROM DAC_STANDARD_ACCEPTOR_BILL A WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM DAC_ACCESS_PROVIDER_BILL WHERE DATA_ID = A.DATA_ID AND SYN_INCEPT_DATA_ID = A.SYN_INCEPT_DATA_ID AND BILL_TYPE = 1 AND PROVIDER_BILL_NO = #{billNo} AND DATA_SEND_TIME >= to_date(#{startTime},'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') AND DATA_SEND_TIME <= to_date(#{endTime},'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss')) AND A.BILL_TYPE = 2

SELECT BILL_TYPE billType, ACCEPTOR_BILL_NO billNo, ACCEPTOR_NO partyNo, RESOURCE_ID resourceId, DATA_COUNT dataCount, DATA_FINGERPRINT dataFingerprint, FINGERPRINT_TYPE fingerprintType, DATA_SIZE dataSize, START_NO startNo, END_NO endNo, SOURCE_LOCATION sourceLocation, BILL_STATE billState, LAST_FAIL_BILL lastFailBill, CHECK_METHOD checkMethod, DATA_ARRIVE_TIME dataTime, DATA_CHECK_TIME dataCheckTime, DATA_SOURCE_NAME dataSourceName, RESULT_DES resultDes, DATA_SOURCE_TYPE dataSourceType, DATA_ADMINISTRATOR dataAdministrator, ADMINISTRATOR_TEL administratorTel, DATA_ID dataId, JOB_NAME jobName, SYN_INCEPT_DATA_ID synInceptDataId FROM DAC_ACCESS_ACCEPTOR_BILL WHERE BILL_TYPE = 2 AND ACCEPTOR_BILL_NO = #{billNo} and DATA_ARRIVE_TIME >= to_date(#{startTime},'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') and DATA_ARRIVE_TIME <= to_date(#{endTime},'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') union all SELECT P.BILL_TYPE billType, P.PROVIDER_BILL_NO billNo, P.PROVIDER_NO partyNo, P.RESOURCE_ID resourceId, P.DATA_COUNT dataCount, P.DATA_FINGERPRINT dataFingerprint, P.FINGERPRINT_TYPE fingerprintType, P.DATA_SIZE dataSize, P.START_NO startNo, P.END_NO endNo, P.SOURCE_LOCATION sourceLocation, P.BILL_STATE billState, P.LAST_FAIL_BILL lastFailBill, P.CHECK_METHOD checkMethod, P.DATA_ARRIVE_TIME dataTime, P.DATA_CHECK_TIME dataCheckTime, P.DATA_SOURCE_NAME dataSourceName, P.RESULT_DES resultDes, P.DATA_SOURCE_TYPE dataSourceType, P.DATA_ADMINISTRATOR dataAdministrator, P.ADMINISTRATOR_TEL administratorTel, P.DATA_ID dataId, P.JOB_NAME jobName, P.SYN_INCEPT_DATA_ID synInceptDataId FROM DAC_ACCESS_STORAGE_INSIDE_BILL P WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM DAC_ACCESS_ACCEPTOR_BILL WHERE DATA_ID=P.DATA_ID AND BILL_TYPE = 2 AND ACCEPTOR_BILL_NO = #{billNo} and DATA_ARRIVE_TIME >= to_date(#{startTime},'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') and DATA_ARRIVE_TIME <= to_date(#{endTime},'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss')) AND P.BILL_TYPE = 1 AND P.IS_LOCAL = '0'

SELECT BILL_TYPE billType, PROVIDER_BILL_NO billNo, PROVIDER_NO partyNo, RESOURCE_ID resourceId, DATA_COUNT dataCount, DATA_FINGERPRINT dataFingerprint, FINGERPRINT_TYPE fingerprintType, DATA_SIZE dataSize, START_NO startNo, END_NO endNo, SOURCE_LOCATION sourceLocation, BILL_STATE billState, LAST_FAIL_BILL lastFailBill, CHECK_METHOD checkMethod, DATA_SEND_TIME dataTime, DATA_CHECK_TIME dataCheckTime, DATA_SOURCE_NAME dataSourceName, RESULT_DES resultDes, DATA_SOURCE_TYPE dataSourceType, DATA_ADMINISTRATOR dataAdministrator, ADMINISTRATOR_TEL administratorTel, DATA_ID dataId FROM DAC_ACCESS_PROVIDER_BILL WHERE BILL_TYPE = 1 AND PROVIDER_BILL_NO = #{billNo} union all SELECT A.BILL_TYPE billType, A.ACCEPTOR_BILL_NO billNo, A.ACCEPTOR_NO partyNo, A.RESOURCE_ID resourceId, A.DATA_COUNT dataCount, A.DATA_FINGERPRINT dataFingerprint, A.FINGERPRINT_TYPE fingerprintType, A.DATA_SIZE dataSize, A.START_NO startNo, A.END_NO endNo, A.SOURCE_LOCATION sourceLocation, A.BILL_STATE billState, A.LAST_FAIL_BILL lastFailBill, A.CHECK_METHOD checkMethod, A.DATA_ARRIVE_TIME dataTime, A.DATA_CHECK_TIME dataCheckTime, A.DATA_SOURCE_NAME dataSourceName, A.RESULT_DES resultDes, A.DATA_SOURCE_TYPE dataSourceType, A.DATA_ADMINISTRATOR dataAdministrator, A.ADMINISTRATOR_TEL administratorTel, A.DATA_ID dataId FROM DAC_STANDARD_ACCEPTOR_BILL A WHERE A.BILL_TYPE = 2 AND A.DATA_ID = (select DATA_ID from DAC_ACCESS_PROVIDER_BILL where PROVIDER_BILL_NO = #{billNo} AND SYN_INCEPT_DATA_ID=A.SYN_INCEPT_DATA_ID)

SELECT BILL_TYPE billType, ACCEPTOR_BILL_NO billNo, ACCEPTOR_NO partyNo, RESOURCE_ID resourceId, DATA_COUNT dataCount, DATA_FINGERPRINT dataFingerprint, FINGERPRINT_TYPE fingerprintType, DATA_SIZE dataSize, START_NO startNo, END_NO endNo, SOURCE_LOCATION sourceLocation, BILL_STATE billState, LAST_FAIL_BILL lastFailBill, CHECK_METHOD checkMethod, DATA_ARRIVE_TIME dataTime, DATA_CHECK_TIME dataCheckTime, DATA_SOURCE_NAME dataSourceName, RESULT_DES resultDes, DATA_SOURCE_TYPE dataSourceType, DATA_ADMINISTRATOR dataAdministrator, ADMINISTRATOR_TEL administratorTel, DATA_ID dataId FROM DAC_STANDARD_ACCEPTOR_BILL WHERE BILL_TYPE = 2 AND ACCEPTOR_BILL_NO = #{billNo} union all SELECT P.BILL_TYPE billType, P.PROVIDER_BILL_NO billNo, P.PROVIDER_NO partyNo, P.RESOURCE_ID resourceId, P.DATA_COUNT dataCount, P.DATA_FINGERPRINT dataFingerprint, P.FINGERPRINT_TYPE fingerprintType, P.DATA_SIZE dataSize, P.START_NO startNo, P.END_NO endNo, P.SOURCE_LOCATION sourceLocation, P.BILL_STATE billState, P.LAST_FAIL_BILL lastFailBill, P.CHECK_METHOD checkMethod, P.DATA_SEND_TIME dataTime, P.DATA_CHECK_TIME dataCheckTime, P.DATA_SOURCE_NAME dataSourceName, P.RESULT_DES resultDes, P.DATA_SOURCE_TYPE dataSourceType, P.DATA_ADMINISTRATOR dataAdministrator, P.ADMINISTRATOR_TEL administratorTel, P.DATA_ID dataId FROM DAC_ACCESS_PROVIDER_BILL P WHERE BILL_TYPE = 1 AND P.DATA_ID = (select DATA_ID from DAC_STANDARD_ACCEPTOR_BILL where ACCEPTOR_BILL_NO = #{billNo} AND SYN_INCEPT_DATA_ID=P.SYN_INCEPT_DATA_ID)

SELECT BILL_TYPE billType, PROVIDER_BILL_NO billNo, PROVIDER_NO partyNo, RESOURCE_ID resourceId, DATA_COUNT dataCount, DATA_FINGERPRINT dataFingerprint, FINGERPRINT_TYPE fingerprintType, DATA_SIZE dataSize, START_NO startNo, END_NO endNo, SOURCE_LOCATION sourceLocation, BILL_STATE billState, LAST_FAIL_BILL lastFailBill, CHECK_METHOD checkMethod, DATA_SEND_TIME dataTime, DATA_CHECK_TIME dataCheckTime, DATA_SOURCE_NAME dataSourceName, RESULT_DES resultDes, DATA_SOURCE_TYPE dataSourceType, DATA_ADMINISTRATOR dataAdministrator, ADMINISTRATOR_TEL administratorTel, DATA_ID dataId, '' jobName, '' isLocal, SYN_INCEPT_DATA_ID synInceptDataId FROM DAC_STANDARD_PROVIDER_BILL WHERE BILL_TYPE = 1 AND PROVIDER_BILL_NO = #{billNo} AND DATA_SEND_TIME >= to_date(#{startTime},'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') AND DATA_SEND_TIME <= to_date(#{endTime},'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') union all SELECT A.BILL_TYPE billType, A.ACCEPTOR_BILL_NO billNo, A.ACCEPTRO_NO partyNo, A.RESOURCE_ID resourceId, A.DATA_COUNT dataCount, A.DATA_FINGERPRINT dataFingerprint, A.FINGERPRINT_TYPE fingerprintType, A.DATA_SIZE dataSize, A.START_NO startNo, A.END_NO endNo, A.SOURCE_LOCATION sourceLocation, A.BILL_STATE billState, A.LAST_FAIL_BILL lastFailBill, A.CHECK_METHOD checkMethod, A.DATA_ARRIVE_TIME dataTime, A.DATA_CHECK_TIME dataCheckTime, A.DATA_SOURCE_NAME dataSourceName, A.RESULT_DES resultDes, A.DATA_SOURCE_TYPE dataSourceType, A.DATA_ADMINISTRATOR dataAdministrator, A.ADMINISTRATOR_TEL administratorTel, A.DATA_ID dataId, '' jobName, '' isLocal, A.SYN_INCEPT_DATA_ID synInceptDataId FROM DAC_STORAGE_ACCEPTOR_BILL A WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM DAC_STANDARD_PROVIDER_BILL WHERE DATA_ID=A.DATA_ID AND SYN_INCEPT_DATA_ID = A.SYN_INCEPT_DATA_ID AND BILL_TYPE = 1 AND PROVIDER_BILL_NO = #{billNo} AND DATA_SEND_TIME >= to_date(#{startTime},'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') AND DATA_SEND_TIME <= to_date(#{endTime},'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss')) AND A.BILL_TYPE = 2 UNION ALL SELECT BILL_TYPE billType, ACCEPTOR_BILL_NO billNo, ACCEPTOR_NO partyNo, RESOURCE_ID resourceId, DATA_COUNT dataCount, DATA_FINGERPRINT dataFingerprint, FINGERPRINT_TYPE fingerprintType, DATA_SIZE dataSize, START_NO startNo, END_NO endNo, SOURCE_LOCATION sourceLocation, BILL_STATE billState, LAST_FAIL_BILL lastFailBill, CHECK_METHOD checkMethod, DATA_ARRIVE_TIME dataTime, DATA_CHECK_TIME dataCheckTime, DATA_SOURCE_NAME dataSourceName, RESULT_DES resultDes, DATA_SOURCE_TYPE dataSourceType, DATA_ADMINISTRATOR dataAdministrator, ADMINISTRATOR_TEL administratorTel, DATA_ID dataId, JOB_NAME jobName, '1' isLocal, SYN_INCEPT_DATA_ID synInceptDataId FROM DAC_ACCESS_ACCEPTOR_BILL WHERE BILL_TYPE = 2 AND ACCEPTOR_BILL_NO = #{billNo} and DATA_ARRIVE_TIME >= to_date(#{startTime},'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') and DATA_ARRIVE_TIME <= to_date(#{endTime},'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') union all SELECT A.BILL_TYPE billType, A.ACCEPTOR_BILL_NO billNo, A.ACCEPTRO_NO partyNo, A.RESOURCE_ID resourceId, A.DATA_COUNT dataCount, A.DATA_FINGERPRINT dataFingerprint, A.FINGERPRINT_TYPE fingerprintType, A.DATA_SIZE dataSize, A.START_NO startNo, A.END_NO endNo, A.SOURCE_LOCATION sourceLocation, A.BILL_STATE billState, A.LAST_FAIL_BILL lastFailBill, A.CHECK_METHOD checkMethod, A.DATA_ARRIVE_TIME dataTime, A.DATA_CHECK_TIME dataCheckTime, A.DATA_SOURCE_NAME dataSourceName, A.RESULT_DES resultDes, A.DATA_SOURCE_TYPE dataSourceType, A.DATA_ADMINISTRATOR dataAdministrator, A.ADMINISTRATOR_TEL administratorTel, A.DATA_ID dataId, A.JOB_NAME jobName, '1' isLocal, A.SYN_INCEPT_DATA_ID synInceptDataId FROM DAC_ACCESS_STORAGE_INSIDE_BILL A WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM DAC_ACCESS_ACCEPTOR_BILL WHERE DATA_ID = A.DATA_ID AND BILL_TYPE = 2 AND ACCEPTOR_BILL_NO = #{billNo} and DATA_ARRIVE_TIME >= to_date(#{startTime},'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') and DATA_ARRIVE_TIME <= to_date(#{endTime},'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss')) AND A.BILL_TYPE = 1 AND A.IS_LOCAL='1'

SELECT 1 billType, ACCEPTOR_BILL_NO billNo, ACCEPTRO_NO partyNo, RESOURCE_ID resourceId, DATA_COUNT dataCount, DATA_FINGERPRINT dataFingerprint, FINGERPRINT_TYPE fingerprintType, DATA_SIZE dataSize, START_NO startNo, END_NO endNo, SOURCE_LOCATION sourceLocation, BILL_STATE billState, LAST_FAIL_BILL lastFailBill, CHECK_METHOD checkMethod, DATA_ARRIVE_TIME dataTime, DATA_CHECK_TIME dataCheckTime, DATA_SOURCE_NAME dataSourceName, RESULT_DES resultDes, DATA_SOURCE_TYPE dataSourceType, DATA_ADMINISTRATOR dataAdministrator, ADMINISTRATOR_TEL administratorTel, DATA_ID dataId, '' jobName, '' isLocal, SYN_INCEPT_DATA_ID synInceptDataId FROM DAC_STORAGE_ACCEPTOR_BILL WHERE BILL_TYPE = 2 AND ACCEPTOR_BILL_NO = #{billNo} and DATA_ARRIVE_TIME >= to_date(#{startTime},'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') and DATA_ARRIVE_TIME <= to_date(#{endTime},'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') union all SELECT 2 billType, P.PROVIDER_BILL_NO billNo, P.PROVIDER_NO partyNo, P.RESOURCE_ID resourceId, P.DATA_COUNT dataCount, P.DATA_FINGERPRINT dataFingerprint, P.FINGERPRINT_TYPE fingerprintType, P.DATA_SIZE dataSize, P.START_NO startNo, P.END_NO endNo, P.SOURCE_LOCATION sourceLocation, P.BILL_STATE billState, P.LAST_FAIL_BILL lastFailBill, P.CHECK_METHOD checkMethod, P.DATA_SEND_TIME dataTime, P.DATA_CHECK_TIME dataCheckTime, P.DATA_SOURCE_NAME dataSourceName, P.RESULT_DES resultDes, P.DATA_SOURCE_TYPE dataSourceType, P.DATA_ADMINISTRATOR dataAdministrator, P.ADMINISTRATOR_TEL administratorTel, P.DATA_ID dataId, '' jobName, '' isLocal, P.SYN_INCEPT_DATA_ID synInceptDataId FROM DAC_STORAGE_PROVIDER_BILL P WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM DAC_STORAGE_ACCEPTOR_BILL WHERE DATA_ID = P.DATA_ID AND SYN_INCEPT_DATA_ID = P.SYN_INCEPT_DATA_ID AND BILL_TYPE = 2 AND ACCEPTOR_BILL_NO = #{billNo} and DATA_ARRIVE_TIME >= to_date(#{startTime},'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') and DATA_ARRIVE_TIME <= to_date(#{endTime},'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss')) AND P.BILL_TYPE = 1 UNION ALL SELECT BILL_TYPE billType, PROVIDER_BILL_NO billNo, PROVIDER_NO partyNo, RESOURCE_ID resourceId, DATA_COUNT dataCount, DATA_FINGERPRINT dataFingerprint, FINGERPRINT_TYPE fingerprintType, DATA_SIZE dataSize, START_NO startNo, END_NO endNo, SOURCE_LOCATION sourceLocation, BILL_STATE billState, LAST_FAIL_BILL lastFailBill, CHECK_METHOD checkMethod, DATA_SEND_TIME dataTime, DATA_CHECK_TIME dataCheckTime, DATA_SOURCE_NAME dataSourceName, RESULT_DES resultDes, DATA_SOURCE_TYPE dataSourceType, DATA_ADMINISTRATOR dataAdministrator, ADMINISTRATOR_TEL administratorTel, DATA_ID dataId, JOB_NAME jobName, '1' isLocal, SYN_INCEPT_DATA_ID synInceptDataId FROM DAC_ACCESS_STORAGE_INSIDE_BILL WHERE BILL_TYPE = 1 AND IS_LOCAL = '1' AND PROVIDER_BILL_NO = #{billNo} AND DATA_SEND_TIME >= to_date(#{startTime},'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') AND DATA_SEND_TIME <= to_date(#{endTime},'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') union all SELECT P.BILL_TYPE billType, P.ACCEPTOR_BILL_NO billNo, P.ACCEPTRO_NO partyNo, P.RESOURCE_ID resourceId, P.DATA_COUNT dataCount, P.DATA_FINGERPRINT dataFingerprint, P.FINGERPRINT_TYPE fingerprintType, P.DATA_SIZE dataSize, P.START_NO startNo, P.END_NO endNo, P.SOURCE_LOCATION sourceLocation, P.BILL_STATE billState, P.LAST_FAIL_BILL lastFailBill, P.CHECK_METHOD checkMethod, P.DATA_ARRIVE_TIME dataTime, P.DATA_CHECK_TIME dataCheckTime, P.DATA_SOURCE_NAME dataSourceName, P.RESULT_DES resultDes, P.DATA_SOURCE_TYPE dataSourceType, P.DATA_ADMINISTRATOR dataAdministrator, P.ADMINISTRATOR_TEL administratorTel, P.DATA_ID dataId, P.JOB_NAME jobName, '1' isLocal, P.SYN_INCEPT_DATA_ID synInceptDataId FROM DAC_ACCESS_STORAGE_INSIDE_BILL P WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM DAC_ACCESS_STORAGE_INSIDE_BILL WHERE DATA_ID = P.DATA_ID AND BILL_TYPE = 1 AND IS_LOCAL = '1' AND PROVIDER_BILL_NO = #{billNo} AND DATA_SEND_TIME >= to_date(#{startTime},'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') AND DATA_SEND_TIME <= to_date(#{endTime},'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss')) AND P.BILL_TYPE = 2 AND P.IS_LOCAL = '1'

select to_char(nvl(SYN_INCEPT_DATA_TIME,DATA_TIME),'yyyy-MM-dd') dataTime from DAC_ACCESS_BILL_STATISTICS WHERE (IS_ISSUED='0' OR IS_ISSUED='' OR IS_ISSUED IS NULL) AND IS_LOCAL = '0' group by to_char(nvl(SYN_INCEPT_DATA_TIME,DATA_TIME),'yyyy-MM-dd')
select to_char(data_time,'yyyy-MM-dd') dataTime from DAC_ACCESS_BILL_STATISTICS WHERE IS_ISSUED='1' group by to_char(data_time,'yyyy-MM-dd')

select T.dataTime from (select to_char(nvl(SYN_INCEPT_DATA_TIME,DATA_TIME), 'yyyy-MM-dd') dataTime from DAC_ACCESS_BILL_STATISTICS WHERE (IS_ISSUED='0' OR IS_ISSUED='' OR IS_ISSUED IS NULL) AND IS_LOCAL = '1' union all select to_char(nvl(SYN_INCEPT_DATA_TIME,DATA_TIME), 'yyyy-MM-dd') dataTime from DAC_STANDARD_BILL_STATISTICS a left join CLASSIFY_SOURCE_TARGET b on a.RESOURCE_ID = b.SJXJBM WHERE a.tache = 2 and upper(a.DIRCTION) = 'ODPS' and (b.PRIMARYORGANIZATIONCH = '原始库' or b.SECONDARYORGANIZATIONCH = '业务生产库'))T group by T.dataTime

select to_char(nvl(SYN_INCEPT_DATA_TIME,DATA_TIME),'yyyy-MM-dd') dataTime from DAC_STANDARD_BILL_STATISTICS a left join CLASSIFY_SOURCE_TARGET b on a.RESOURCE_ID = b.SJXJBM WHERE a.tache = 2 and (upper(a.DIRCTION) != 'ODPS' or (b.PRIMARYORGANIZATIONCH != '原始库' and b.SECONDARYORGANIZATIONCH != '业务生产库')) group by to_char(nvl(SYN_INCEPT_DATA_TIME,DATA_TIME),'yyyy-MM-dd')
select to_char(nvl(SYN_INCEPT_DATA_TIME,DATA_TIME), 'yyyy-MM-dd') from DAC_STANDARD_BILL_STATISTICS where tache = 1 group by to_char(nvl(SYN_INCEPT_DATA_TIME,DATA_TIME), 'yyyy-MM-dd')
SELECT DISTINCT SERVICE_IP FROM DAC_ACCESS_ACCEPTOR_BILL UNION SELECT DISTINCT SERVICE_IP FROM DAC_ACCESS_STORAGE_INSIDE_BILL WHERE BILL_TYPE =1 AND IS_LOCAL = '0'
SELECT DISTINCT SERVICE_IP FROM DAC_ACCESS_PROVIDER_BILL

SELECT DISTINCT SERVICE_IP FROM DAC_STANDARD_PROVIDER_BILL WHERE BILL_TYPE = 1 UNION SELECT DISTINCT SERVICE_IP FROM DAC_STORAGE_ACCEPTOR_BILL WHERE BILL_TYPE = 2 UNION SELECT DISTINCT SERVICE_IP FROM DAC_ACCESS_ACCEPTOR_BILL WHERE BILL_TYPE = 2 UNION SELECT DISTINCT SERVICE_IP FROM DAC_ACCESS_STORAGE_INSIDE_BILL WHERE BILL_TYPE = 1 AND IS_LOCAL = '1'
SELECT DISTINCT SERVICE_IP FROM DAC_STANDARD_PROVIDER_BILL union SELECT DISTINCT SERVICE_IP FROM DAC_STORAGE_ACCEPTOR_BILL

SELECT count( 1 ) FROM ( SELECT A.RESOURCE_ID FROM DAC_ACCESS_BILL_STATISTICS A LEFT JOIN CLASSIFY_INTERFACE_ALL_DATE B ON UPPER(A.TABLE_NAME) = UPPER(B.TABLENAME) WHERE A.IS_ISSUED='1' and A.TACHE = #{tache} and A.DATA_TIME >= to_date(#{startTime},'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') and A.DATA_TIME < to_date(#{endTime},'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss')
and decode(B.NAME,null,A.resource_Id,B.NAME) like '%'||#{dataName}||'%'
GROUP BY A.RESOURCE_ID, A.DIRCTION UNION ALL SELECT A.RESOURCE_ID FROM DAC_ACCESS_BILL_STATISTICS A LEFT JOIN (select C.*, row_number() over (PARTITION BY yxybm ORDER BY INSERT_DATE DESC) as rn from CLASSIFY_SOURCE_TARGET C) B ON A.resource_Id = B.YXYBM and B.rn = 1 WHERE (A.IS_ISSUED='0' OR A.IS_ISSUED='' OR A.IS_ISSUED IS NULL) and TACHE = #{tache} and DATA_TIME >= to_date(#{startTime},'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') and DATA_TIME < to_date(#{endTime},'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss')
and nvl(B.NAME, nvl(A.JOB_NAME, A.RESOURCE_ID)) like '%'||#{dataName}||'%'
GROUP BY A.RESOURCE_ID, A.DIRCTION )

SELECT count( 1 ) FROM ( SELECT A.RESOURCE_ID FROM DAC_STANDARD_BILL_STATISTICS A LEFT JOIN CLASSIFY_SOURCE_TARGET B ON A.resource_Id = B.SJXJBM WHERE A.DATA_TIME >= to_date(#{startTime},'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') and A.DATA_TIME < to_date(#{endTime},'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss')
and nvl(B.NAME, A.RESOURCE_ID) LIKE '%'||#{dataName}||'%'
GROUP BY A.RESOURCE_ID, A.DIRCTION)
SELECT DISTINCT RESOURCE_ID FROM DAC_ACCESS_BILL_STATISTICS WHERE DATA_TIME >= to_date( #{startTime}, 'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss' ) AND DATA_TIME <= to_date( #{endTime}, 'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss' )
SELECT DISTINCT RESOURCE_ID FROM DAC_STANDARD_BILL_STATISTICS WHERE DATA_TIME >= to_date( #{startTime}, 'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss' ) AND DATA_TIME <= to_date( #{endTime}, 'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss' )
mapper.update: UPDATE BILL_STATISTIC_HISTORY set STATUS=#{status} where ID = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT RESOURCE_ID resourceId, DIRECTION direction, TACHE tache, STATUS status FROM BILL_STATISTIC_HISTORY t WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM BILL_STATISTIC_HISTORY WHERE RESOURCE_ID = t.RESOURCE_ID AND TACHE = t.TACHE AND DIRECTION = t.DIRECTION AND SYSTEM = t.SYSTEM AND CREATETIME > t.CREATETIME ) and DATA_TIME = to_date(#{dataTime},'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') and SYSTEM = #{system}
select DISTINCT dirction from DAC_ACCESS_BILL_STATISTICS WHERE IS_LOCAL = '0'
select DISTINCT dirction from DAC_STANDARD_BILL_STATISTICS WHERE TACHE = 1

select DISTINCT dirction from DAC_ACCESS_BILL_STATISTICS WHERE IS_LOCAL = '1' UNION select DISTINCT dirction from DAC_STANDARD_BILL_STATISTICS a left join CLASSIFY_SOURCE_TARGET b on a.RESOURCE_ID = b.SJXJBM WHERE a.tache = 2 and upper(a.DIRCTION)='ODPS' and (b.PRIMARYORGANIZATIONCH = '原始库' or b.SECONDARYORGANIZATIONCH = '业务生产库')

select DISTINCT dirction from DAC_STANDARD_BILL_STATISTICS a left join CLASSIFY_SOURCE_TARGET b on a.RESOURCE_ID = b.SJXJBM WHERE a.tache = 2 and (upper(a.DIRCTION)!='ODPS' or (b.PRIMARYORGANIZATIONCH != '原始库' and b.SECONDARYORGANIZATIONCH != '业务生产库'))

SELECT PROVIDER_BILL_NO billNo, RESOURCE_ID resourceId, DATA_COUNT dataCount, START_NO beginNo, END_NO endNo, '提供方账单' billType, DATA_SEND_TIME sendTime, DATA_CHECK_TIME checkTime, DATA_SOURCE_NAME dataSourceName, DECODE(DATA_SOURCE_TYPE,'1','数据包','2','数据文件','3','数据库') dataSourceType, SERVICE_IP accessSystem FROM DAC_STANDARD_PROVIDER_BILL WHERE BILL_TYPE =1
and DATA_SEND_TIME >= to_date(#{startTime},'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss')
and DATA_SEND_TIME <= to_date(#{endTime},'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss')

SELECT ACCEPTOR_BILL_NO billNo, RESOURCE_ID resourceId, DATA_COUNT dataCount, START_NO beginNo, END_NO endNo, '接入方账单' billType, DATA_ARRIVE_TIME sendTime, DATA_CHECK_TIME checkTime, DATA_SOURCE_NAME dataSourceName, DECODE(DATA_SOURCE_TYPE,'1','数据包','2','数据文件','3','数据库') dataSourceType, SERVICE_IP accessSystem FROM DAC_STORAGE_ACCEPTOR_BILL WHERE BILL_TYPE =2
and DATA_ARRIVE_TIME >= to_date(#{startTime},'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss')
and DATA_ARRIVE_TIME <= to_date(#{endTime},'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss')

SELECT P.RESOURCE_ID resourceId, P.DATA_SOURCE_NAME dataSource, P.SERVICE_IP accessSystem, P.DATA_DIRECTION direction, P.USER_ID userId, P.USER_NAME userName, P.INSIDE_PROVIDE insideProvide, P.startNo, A.INSIDE_ACCEPT insideAccess, 1 tache, to_date ( #{date1}, 'yyyy-mm-dd HH24:mi:ss' ) dataTime FROM ( SELECT RESOURCE_ID, DATA_SOURCE_NAME, SERVICE_IP, DATA_DIRECTION, min(USER_ID) USER_ID, min(USER_NAME) USER_NAME, sum( DATA_COUNT ) INSIDE_PROVIDE, min( START_NO ) startNo FROM DAC_ACCESS_INSIDE_BILL WHERE BILL_TYPE = 1 AND RESOURCE_ID = #{resourceId} AND DATA_DIRECTION = #{dataDirection} AND DATA_SEND_TIME >= to_date ( #{date1}, 'yyyy-mm-dd HH24:mi:ss' ) AND DATA_SEND_TIME < to_date ( #{date2}, 'yyyy-mm-dd HH24:mi:ss' ) GROUP BY RESOURCE_ID, DATA_SOURCE_NAME, SERVICE_IP, DATA_DIRECTION ) P LEFT JOIN ( SELECT RESOURCE_ID, DATA_SOURCE_NAME, SERVICE_IP, DATA_DIRECTION, sum( DATA_COUNT ) INSIDE_ACCEPT FROM DAC_ACCESS_INSIDE_BILL WHERE BILL_TYPE = 2 AND RESOURCE_ID = #{resourceId} AND DATA_DIRECTION = #{dataDirection} AND DATA_SEND_TIME >= to_date ( #{date1}, 'yyyy-mm-dd HH24:mi:ss' ) AND DATA_SEND_TIME < to_date ( #{date2}, 'yyyy-mm-dd HH24:mi:ss' ) GROUP BY RESOURCE_ID, DATA_SOURCE_NAME, SERVICE_IP, DATA_DIRECTION ) A ON P.RESOURCE_ID = A.RESOURCE_ID AND P.DATA_SOURCE_NAME = A.DATA_SOURCE_NAME AND P.SERVICE_IP = A.SERVICE_IP AND P.DATA_DIRECTION = A.DATA_DIRECTION
select yxybm as sourceId, sjxjbm as resourceId, name as tableName from CLASSIFY_SOURCE_TARGET where sjxjbm is not null and name is not null
select to_char(data_arrive_time, 'yyyy-MM-dd') from DAC_ACCESS_ACCEPTOR_BILL group by to_char(data_arrive_time, 'yyyy-MM-dd')
select to_char(data_send_time, 'yyyy-MM-dd') from DAC_ACCESS_STORAGE_INSIDE_BILL WHERE BILL_TYPE =1 AND IS_LOCAL = '0' group by to_char(data_send_time, 'yyyy-MM-dd')
select to_char(data_send_time, 'yyyy-MM-dd') from DAC_ACCESS_PROVIDER_BILL WHERE DATA_DIRECTION = 2 group by to_char(data_send_time, 'yyyy-MM-dd')

select to_char(T.dataTime, 'yyyy-MM-dd') from (select data_send_time dataTime FROM DAC_STANDARD_PROVIDER_BILL WHERE BILL_TYPE = 1 union all select data_arrive_time dataTime FROM DAC_ACCESS_ACCEPTOR_BILL WHERE BILL_TYPE = 2) T group by to_char(T.dataTime, 'yyyy-MM-dd')

select to_char(T.dataTime, 'yyyy-MM-dd') from (select data_arrive_time dataTime FROM DAC_STORAGE_ACCEPTOR_BILL WHERE BILL_TYPE = 2 union all select data_send_time dataTime FROM DAC_ACCESS_STORAGE_INSIDE_BILL WHERE BILL_TYPE = 1 AND IS_LOCAL = '1') T group by to_char(T.dataTime, 'yyyy-MM-dd')

select days.dataTime beginTime, nvl(sum(m.thirdpartyProvide), 0) thirdpartyProvide, nvl(sum(m.accessProvide), 0) accessProvide, nvl(sum(m.accessAccept), 0) accessAccept from (select to_char(to_date(#{endTime}, 'yyyy-MM-dd') - LEVEL + 1, 'yyyy-MM-dd') dataTime from dual connect by LEVEL <= #{days}) days left join (SELECT to_char(DATA_TIME, 'yyyy-MM-dd') dataTime, ACCESS_SYSTEM accessSystem, DATA_SOURCE dataSourceName, RESOURCE_ID resourceId, INSIDE_PROVIDE accessProvide, INSIDE_ACCEPT accessAccept, DIRCTION dataDirection FROM DAC_STANDARD_BILL_STATISTICS WHERE resource_id = #{resourceId} and tache = #{tache} ) m on days.dataTime = m.dataTime group by days.dataTime order by days.dataTime
select RES_ID, SOURCE_CODE as resourceId,PROVIDER as dataAdministrator,PROVIDE_TEL as administratorTel from ds_detected_table where SOURCE_CODE is not null
select SJXJBM as resourceId,JRFWR as dataAdministrator,JRFWLXDH as administratorTel from SYNLTE.PUBLIC_DATA_INFO WHERE SJXJBM is not null
select RES_ID, SOURCE_CODE as resourceId,ROUTINE_LINKMAN as dataAdministrator,ROUTINE_TEL as administratorTel from ds_detected_table where SOURCE_CODE is not null
select distinct valvalue as dataSourceCode, valtext as dataSource from SYNLTE.fieldcodeval where codeid ='JZCODE0024' and memo is not null and sortindex is not null
